evidence.source_title: Ahmad Ali Masoud Ansari is Farah Pahlavi's cousin — One News Box
evidence.description: Ahmad Ali Masoud Ansari is described as a second cousin of Farah Pahlavi, with close ties to the Pahlavi court.

evidence.source_title: Pahlavi confidant alleges fraud and feud in the Royal family — Kodoom
evidence.description: Described as being in the innermost circle of confidants to former Queen Farah and the Shah.

editorial_notes: First cousin. Ahmad's father Mohammad Ali Massoud Ansari is Farah's cousin. Ahmad's grandmother was Farah's aunt.
